tooltip.fantasy_earth.notebook.use: Right-click to open the magic handbook: starter route, mana, arcane stations and JEI lookup.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.notebook.scope: Independent magic branch: content replication, not survival difficulty simulation.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.arcane_initiation_: Starter magic study: organizes observable magic into the shared mana value.
Right-click to unlock aether attunement. Once researched, it opens the arcane panel without resolving a cycle.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.arcane_body_ward_n: Starter arcane body ward: stable magic buffers environment stress and fatigue.
Requires arcane initiation. First use unlocks the body-ward circuit; later uses open the panel.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.arcane_breath_ward: Water breathing attunement: magic maintains breathing rhythm and extends underwater air.
Requires arcane initiation. First use unlocks the breathing circuit; later uses open the panel.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.material.route: Magic material used in crafting, alchemy, rune carving, ritual conversion and JEI lookup.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.block.route: Arcane station: right-click to open the screen, insert material, and attune or convert it with local aether.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat: Portable attunement aid: sit for full circuit efficiency, extra aether gathering and continuous focus. The configurable panel key also works without a mat.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.alchemy_table: Blends arcane dust, mana salts, aether glass and other basic magical materials.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.rune_carving_table: Carves rune ink into copper plates, stone and ritual parts.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.ritual_pedestal: Center anchor for small rituals. It works alone, but a 3x3 ritual circle strengthens it.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.machine.alchemy_ta: Converts arcane dust, aether crystals and glowstone dust into mana salt, aether glass and starter arcane dust.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.machine.rune_carvi: Processes rune ink, rune copper plates and ritual chalk into rune parts and ward notes.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.machine.ritual_ped: Uses local aether to activate cores, salts and aether glass. A four-corner crystal circle with side marks works faster.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.aether_crystal_clu: An aether crystallization node that raises the nearby field, suitable for alchemy areas and ritual circles.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.arcane_dust: A basic powder made by treating redstone, glowstone and amethyst as observable magic carriers.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.rune_ink: Conductive ink for stable rune writing.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.ritual_chalk: Marks ritual boundaries and node positions.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.crystallized_mana_: Low-tier mana salt that stores weak magical charge.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.aether_glass: Transparent material that can hold weak aether flow.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.rune_copper_plate: Copper conductivity combined with rune ink.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.aether_crystal: Stable magic-gathering crystal for ritual cores.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.dormant_ritual_cor: Inactive ritual core that can be activated on the Ritual Pedestal into aether crystals or looped into ritual packaging.
guide.fantasy_earth.line1: Positioning: independent magic branch. Magic is learnable, craftable and engineerable.
guide.fantasy_earth.line2: Start: craft this notebook from one dirt, any planks or any stone.
guide.fantasy_earth.line3: Base: redstone + glowstone dust + amethyst shard => arcane dust.
guide.fantasy_earth.line4: Stations: alchemy blends, rune carving writes, ritual pedestal anchors.
guide.fantasy_earth.line5: Compatibility: this mod runs alone and uses optional dependencies, shared mana keys and material routes for the Earth mod ecosystem.
guide.fantasy_earth.line6: Mana: magic and qi share one mana value. If Xuanhuan is also trained, both bonuses add up.
guide.fantasy_earth.line7: This is an in-development test build; recipes and values will change.
message.fantasy_earth.arcana.status: Mana: %s/%s (qi route +%s, magic route +%s; both routes can be trained together and add up).
message.fantasy_earth.notebook.field: Local aether field: %s (%s/100); main source %s, disturbance %s/45.
message.fantasy_earth.block.field: Aether field reading: %s (%s/100); main source %s, disturbance %s/45.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_notes.learn: You understood arcane initiation: magical attunement can now become shared mana.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_notes.alrea: Arcane initiation is complete. Use the arcane panel or focus mat to gain circuit experience.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_notes.focus: Local aether field: %s (%s/100), attunement restored mana +%s.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_notes.coold: You just attuned the field. Wait %s seconds. Attunement disturbs this chunk; mana salts and crystals are consumable recovery routes outside this cooldown.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_notes.field: Aether source: %s; this chunk is now %s/45 disturbed and will stabilize over time.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_body_ward_n: You understood Arcane Body Ward: magic now buffers body and environmental pressure.
The body-ward circuit is already unlocked; it is now selected in the arcane panel.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_breath_ward: You understood Water Breathing Attunement: underwater air and breathing capacity improved.
The breathing circuit is already unlocked; it is now selected in the arcane panel.
Advanced circuits require arcane initiation. Study the Arcane Initiation Notes first.
Current growth: about %s%% less metabolic drain, %s%% less combat damage, %s%% longer underwater breathing, mana cap %s.
message.fantasy_earth.mana_consumable.us: You absorb %s and restore +%s mana; current %s/%s.
message.fantasy_earth.mana_consumable.fu: Mana is already full (%s/%s); no item was consumed.
message.fantasy_earth.human_recovery: Earth Human link: fatigue -%s, torso/limb healing total +%s.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat.s: You sit on the focus mat and open the arcane view. Select a researched circuit for each cycle; press Shift to leave.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat.o: Someone is already attuning on this focus mat.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat.l: You complete your first arcane attunement on the focus mat. Your magic circuit starts to stabilize.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat.u: You settle your magic circuit on the focus mat. Stable aether slowly suppresses fatigue.
message.fantasy_earth.arcane_focus_mat.r: Local aether: %s (%s/100), mana +%s; fatigue -%s, body healing +%s.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.learned.f: You complete your first arcane attunement without a focus facility. The basic circuit is established; mats and ritual circles only improve stability.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.used.free: You complete one aether attunement where you stand. Free attunement works anywhere but is less efficient than a focus mat.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.learned.f: You complete your first attunement on a focus mat, where stable nodes close the magic circuit cleanly.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.used.focu: The focus mat anchors perception nodes while aether completes one stable circuit.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.requires_: You have not completed arcane initiation. The handbook only guides you; craft and study the initiation notes first.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.result: Local aether: %s (%s/100), mana +%s, research XP +%s; level %s (%s); fatigue -%s, body healing +%s; efficiency %s%%.
message.fantasy_earth.practice.level_up: %s reached level %s; its mana, attunement or body adaptation permanently increased.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.requires_res: The selected circuit has not been researched, so its spell cannot be used.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.cooldown: The spell circuit is cooling down. Wait %s seconds.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.no_mana: Not enough mana; this spell costs %s.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.activated.at: Aether Pulse completes, spending %s mana to sharpen senses and movement.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.activated.bo: Arcane Ward unfolds, spending %s mana for temporary protection.
message.fantasy_earth.skill.activated.br: The breathing circuit closes, spending %s mana to restore underwater respiration.
screen.fantasy_earth.machine.unsupported: This material is not valid for this arcane station
screen.fantasy_earth.machine.invalid_com: These materials do not form a valid process
screen.fantasy_earth.machine.role.alchem: Dual-vessel blending: primary material and reagent combine under control
screen.fantasy_earth.machine.role.rune_c: Clamped inscription: the reagent supplies ink or conducting energy
screen.fantasy_earth.machine.role.ritual: Central anchoring: the aether field completes conversion through nodes
screen.fantasy_earth.structure.ritual.fo: Ritual circle formed: -12 requirement, faster work
screen.fantasy_earth.structure.ritual.po: Small ritual pedestal: 3x3 circle upgrades it
screen.fantasy_earth.structure.ritual.hi: Pattern: ritual pedestal center, aether or amethyst clusters on corners, bookshelves/glowstone/redstone blocks/alchemy or rune tables on sides.
screen.fantasy_earth.redstone.always.des: The station runs whenever input, output and local aether are valid.
screen.fantasy_earth.redstone.require_si: The station only runs while powered by redstone.
screen.fantasy_earth.redstone.require_no: The station runs without redstone and pauses when powered.
screen.fantasy_earth.redstone.tooltip: Click the icon to cycle modes. Materials are not consumed unless processing can finish.
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.title: Fantasy Earth Handbook
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.subtitle: Magic, runes, rituals and shared mana
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.status.loc: Current state: arcane initiation is incomplete. The field handbook never researches it automatically.
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.status.cur: Current state: %s Lv.%s, XP %s; %s circuits researched.
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.status.nex: Next: craft and study Arcane Initiation Notes with a book, arcane dust and an amethyst shard.
Next: attune the selected circuit or study body-ward and breathing notes to unlock more circuits.
Next: advance the selected circuit in the panel or on a focus mat; active spells do not grant research XP.
screen.fantasy_earth.handbook.journey.co: Core journey complete. Keep researching circuits, settlements and familiars.
message.fantasy_earth.journey.complete: The core fantasy journey is complete. You gained 30 XP and can now freely master circuits, rituals and familiars.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.initiation: Craft and study Arcane Initiation Notes with a book, arcane dust and an amethyst shard.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.attunement: Use the arcane-panel key to complete one attunement; a focus mat is an optional efficiency aid.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.facility_outp: Finish a recipe in an alchemy table, rune carving table or ritual pedestal, then take its output yourself.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.active_spell: With enough mana and no cooldown, cast the selected circuit's active spell.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.mana_recovery: While below maximum mana, use crystallized mana salt or an aether crystal and actually restore mana.
journey.fantasy_earth.next.familiar_cont: Raise a wild familiar to 3 stability with arcane dust, then bind it with a familiar contract.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.title: Arcane Interior
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.subtitle: Aether fields, circuits and body integration
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.practice: Stabilize one magic circuit at your current position. It uses local aether and has a cooldown, but requires no mat.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.skill.at: Aether Pulse spends mana to sharpen senses and movement. Default key: B; it is configurable.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.skill.bo: Arcane Ward spends mana for resistance and absorption; levels extend the effect.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.skill.br: Breathing Circuit spends mana to refill extended air and grant water breathing.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.leave_fo: End continuous attunement and leave the focus mat. Shift also works while seated.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.focus.at: Balances the magic circuit and prioritizes mana recovery.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.focus.bo: Trades mana efficiency for recovery and brief protection.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.focus.br: Maintains the breathing circuit, restores air and grants water breathing.
screen.fantasy_earth.attunement.focus.lo: Study the matching notes before selecting this focus.
hud.fantasy_earth.focus.title: %s · Lv.%s Focus
hud.fantasy_earth.focus.hint: Shift to leave · Stay seated to continue
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.mana_salt_c: Arcane dust crystallizes into stable mana salt with glowstone
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.aether_glas: Aether crystal and glass fuse into aether-conducting glass
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.starter_arc: Glowstone and amethyst blend into starter arcane dust
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.geological_: A geological catalyst draws additional arcane dust from glowstone
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.rune_copper: Rune ink inscribes a stable circuit on a conducting material
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.body_ward_n: A body-ward circuit is inscribed into a rune copper plate
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.breath_ward: Aether glass seals a breathing circuit into a rune copper plate
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.inscribed_r: Rune ink inscribes ritual boundaries into a chalk core
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.core_activa: Mana salt awakens a dormant core and condenses aether crystals
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.core_sealin: Aether glass and mana salt seal a new dormant ritual core
recipe.fantasy_earth.machine.substrate_c: An aether substrate condenses into crystals in mana salt
jei.fantasy_earth.handbook.1: Right-click the Field Arcane Notebook to open the handbook. Dirt, planks or stone can craft it.
jei.fantasy_earth.handbook.2: Alchemy Table, Rune Carving Table and Ritual Pedestal each have JEI categories; the pedestal can form a 3x3 ritual circle.
jei.fantasy_earth.handbook.3: If a station does not run, check input, output space, redstone mode and local aether.
tooltip.fantasy_earth.familiar_contract: Raise stability to 3 with arcane dust, then use the contract to bind the familiar.
message.fantasy_earth.familiar.stability: Familiar stability: %s/%s. Use a contract when stability is full.
Stability is too low: %s/%s. Use arcane dust first.
message.fantasy_earth.familiar.contracte: %s has been bound as your familiar. Right-click with an empty hand to change its mode.
message.fantasy_earth.settlement.anchor: This is the arcane anchor for %s. Residents initialize after the chunk is safely loaded.
